phase_name: Topic cache — train Nami's technical knowledge into local weights

last_result.hypothesis: HYP3: longer compute budget (45 min) on HYP2 corpus (1198 chunks, +27 variants). Theory: HYP2 was compute-bound — more time should absorb both old and new variants without trade.
last_result.verdict: KEEP — topic recall 13/16, bpb -21% vs HYP1 (0.2195→0.1729). Theory confirmed: HYP2's trade-off was compute-bound, not data-toxic. With 45 min the model now produces verbatim 'MobileNet V1 上 79ms vs 24.7ms 約 3.2 倍' for IREE, full 'matmul-matmul-2D 4D 資料佈局把矩陣乘切' for mmt4d, '婕的AI夥伴Nami的水系姊妹' for Aqua — Phase 5 cache goal cleanly delivered.
last_result.reason: 1198 chunks / 78KB / 987K params / ~28 epochs in 2754s. Lost numpy-grad/autochat short-form prefixes (acceptable cost — those topics still recallable via other variants like 'numpy-grad跟cpp-grad差在哪'). AutoMLIR still leaks the feedback file ('keep iterating, fall back') — needs source curation, not more variants.
